    1. receive(MessageContext)

Interface MessageReceiver

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractInOutMessageReceiver, AbstractMessageReceiver, CallbackReceiver, CorbaInOnlyMessageReceiver, CorbaMessageReceiver, EJB3InOnlyMessageReceiver, EJB3MessageReceiver, EJBInOnlyMessageReceiver, EJBInOutAsyncMessageReceiver, EJBMessageReceiver, JAXWSMessageReceiver, JsonInOnlyRPCMessageReceiver, JsonInOnlyRPCMessageReceiver, JsonRpcMessageReceiver, JsonRpcMessageReceiver, MexMessageReceiver, PingMessageReceiver, RawXMLINOnlyMessageReceiver, RawXMLINOutMessageReceiver, RPCInOnlyMessageReceiver, RPCInOutAsyncMessageReceiver, RPCMessageReceiver
public interface MessageReceiver
An instance of MessageReceiver can be setup to receive messages. The application logic has no impact on the Axis Engine itself. It is up to the application logic to do whatever it needs. For e.g. the MessageReceiver can handle a message, send a response back and/or send other messages.
